name: Easy Plugin
description: Show, hide, reorder and add plugin configuration entries in the Jellyfin admin sidebar, with inline plugin settings. The client script is injected in-memory via the File Transformation plugin, so index.html is never patched on disk.
overview: Tidy the admin sidebar: hide, reorder and add plugin entries.

versions.changelog: Changes now apply to the sidebar instantly with no page reload: toggling a plugin on/off, adding/removing an extra, reordering and the master enable switch all reflect live. Removing a previously-added plugin now also removes its sidebar entry live.

Pin the plugins section just below the server logo (never above it). One row per plugin on the config page (multi-page plugins are no longer grouped). Plugins that aren't normally in the sidebar moved into a collapsible "Add another plugin" section, so the main list shows only the active entries. Disabling now fully restores the original sidebar.

First release. Hide, reorder and force-add plugin entries in the admin sidebar; collapsible groups for multi-page plugins; inline plugin settings via iframe. Injects via File Transformation (auto-installs it, or uses Custom Theme's bundled provider).
